nasb.text: Then David said, “No one is to carry the ark of God but the Levites; for the Lord chose them to carry the ark of God and to minister to Him forever.”

esv.text: Then David said that no one but the Levites may carry the ark of God, for the Lord had chosen them to carry the ark of the Lord and to minister to him forever.

cnv.text: 那時大衛說：“　神的約櫃，除了利未人以外，沒有人可以抬，因為耶和華揀選了他們抬　神的約櫃，並且永遠事奉他。”

ccb.text: 大卫说：“除了利未人以外，谁也不可抬上帝的约柜，因为耶和华只拣选他们抬上帝的约柜，永远事奉祂。”
